situations.State

Packages that use State
Package
Description
situations
Contain the situational and state class

  • Uses of State in situations

    Methods in situations that return State
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    State
    Situation.getstate()
    Retrieves the current state of he calculator
    static State
    State.valueOf(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    static State[]
    State.values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    Methods in situations with parameters of type State
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Situation.updateState(State newState)
    Updates the state of the calculator to the specified new state
